texto: When praying for healing ask great things of God and expect great things from God. But let us seek for that healing that really matters the healing of the heart enabling us to trust God simply face God honestly and live triumphantly.
explicacao: Citação de Arlo F. Newell sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “When praying for healing ask great things of God and expect great things from God. But let us see…” articula reflexao, prayer, healing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
